title: Sun-Dried Tomato Pasta
description: A simple British-inspired pasta dish featuring sun-dried tomatoes and poached chicken.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the sun-dried tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the poached chicken breast to the skillet and stir to combine with the tomatoes and butter.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
In a separate bowl, combine the cooked pasta, chicken and tomato mixture, and toss to combine.
Top with grated Parmesan cheese and chopped fresh basil.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
